cards.title: ⁓ well-used systems naturally grow complex
cards.content: a meta observation, definitely (at least at times) see that in my "reading system"

cards.title: ~ reading too fast or too slow is harmful
cards.content:
> Pascal observed three hundred years ago, “When we read too fast or too slowly, we understand nothing.”

— 📖 How to Read a Book

*sounds like Goldilocks principle*

cards.title: > Don’t read this book for its content; read its content for its practices.
cards.content:
— 📖 Praying Like Monks, Living Like Fools

also: *always look for applications*

cards.title: ~ read a page of a book, close the book, write down what you remember
cards.content:
— [The Best Learning Tool in History - 400 years ahead of its time!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lML0ndFlBuc)

- well this only works if the book is really that good...(or/and you care that much about every detail)
